metadata.tagline: Manage your stress and experience greater calm and clarity
metadata.purpose: Detailed visual dashboard with FULL scripts and guidance

approaches.script: Hey, I couldn't help but notice you look like you've got a lot on your plate — I totally get that. I actually work with something called Peace by Super Patch that helps people manage stress and find real calm without any pills or supplements. Have you ever tried anything drug-free for stress relief?

You know how you've been telling me how stressed you've been lately? I started using this patch called Peace from Super Patch — it's helped me feel so much calmer and more clear-headed, completely drug-free. Would you be open to hearing how it works?

Hey! I saw your post about how hectic things have been — I can totally relate. I've been using something called Peace by Super Patch that's been a game-changer for managing stress and staying centered throughout the day. Would you be interested in learning more about how it works?

Hi! [Mutual friend] mentioned you've been dealing with a lot of stress and thought I should reach out. I work with a product called Peace from Super Patch that helps people find calm and clarity naturally — no drugs, no side effects. Would you be open to a quick chat about it?

So what do you do to unwind after a long week? I ask because I work with this amazing product called Peace by Super Patch — it's a drug-free patch that helps with stress management and bringing back that sense of calm. What does your current stress-relief routine look like?

2b_rapport_story.title: 🫂 BUILD RAPPORT
2b_rapport_story.description: Share your personal story to build trust
2b_rapport_story.personal_story: [Name], can I be honest? My stress was through the roof. Snapping at my family, couldn't turn it off even on my days off. Someone gave me this Peace patch and I put it on not expecting anything. But that evening, [Name], I sat on the couch and actually felt calm. Not tired — just calm. My wife actually asked me what was different before I even said anything.
talking_points: Use their name and ask to be honest — it disarms people
Be specific about how stress showed up in your life
Share the exact moment you felt different
Describe the feeling, not product benefits
Don't pitch — the fact that someone else noticed is the proof
2b_rapport_story.transition_to_discovery: [Name], anyway, that's me. How are you managing stress right now? Under control or running the show?

questions.question: What does a typical stressful day look like for you — what are the biggest things weighing on you right now?
When you imagine feeling truly calm and clear-headed, what does that look like for you?
Where do you feel stress showing up in your body — headaches, tight shoulders, stomach issues, trouble sleeping?
How is the stress affecting your sleep? Are you able to wind down at night or does your mind just keep racing?
Do you feel like stress is starting to take a toll on your relationships or your patience with the people you care about?
If you could wake up tomorrow feeling genuinely calm and in control, what's the first thing you'd do differently with your day?
How much of your day do you think gets lost to just feeling overwhelmed or mentally drained from stress?
What have you tried so far to manage your stress — meditation apps, supplements, exercise, anything like that? What worked and what didn't?
How important is it to you that a stress solution is drug-free and something you don't have to remember to take throughout the day?
If there was something simple you could wear that helped you stay calm and focused all day without any pills or side effects, would that be something you'd want to try?

content.problem: You're carrying stress from the moment you wake up to the moment you try to fall asleep — except your mind won't let you. It feels like there's always something demanding your attention, and no matter what you do, you can't seem to quiet the noise. That constant state of overwhelm isn't just exhausting, it's becoming your normal.
content.agitate: And it doesn't stop with you. The stress is stealing your sleep, leaving you tossing and turning with racing thoughts night after night. You're snapping at the people you love over things that shouldn't matter, and you can feel the tension building in your body — headaches, tight shoulders, that knot in your stomach. Chronic stress doesn't just wear you down mentally, it takes a real toll on your health and your relationships. {{discovery_callback}}
content.solve: That's exactly why Peace was created. It uses Vibrotactile Technology — VTT — to support your body's natural relaxation response, helping you find genuine calm and clarity without sedatives, pills, or side effects. You just wear the patch and it works with your nervous system to ease that tension naturally. Peace gives you back the ability to breathe, think clearly, and actually be present for the moments that matter.

objections.response: I completely understand. Let me ask — what are you currently spending to manage stress? Between therapy sessions, meditation apps, supplements, or even just the cost of stress on your health and productivity, it adds up fast. Peace costs less per day than a coffee and supports calm and clarity all day long with zero side effects. What would real, lasting stress relief be worth to your daily life?
objections.psychology: Reframe cost against therapy bills, supplements, and the hidden toll stress takes on health and income

objections.response: Absolutely — no pressure at all. Can I ask what's on your mind? Is it whether Peace actually helps with stress, or is it more about whether you're ready to try something new? A lot of people dealing with stress feel hesitant because they've tried things before that either made them drowsy or didn't last. Peace is different — no drowsiness, no dependency, no pills to remember. What would help you feel good about this decision?
objections.psychology: Address the hidden fear that another stress product will disappoint or come with unwanted sedative effects

objections.response: That's a great idea — and honestly, when stress goes down for one person, the whole household benefits. When you talk to your spouse, they'll probably want to know if it's safe and whether it causes drowsiness. Peace is 100% drug-free with no sedative effects — it promotes natural calm and clarity without making you foggy. They might even want to try it themselves. What questions do you think they'd have?
objections.psychology: Position stress relief as a family benefit — a calmer you means a calmer home

objections.response: I totally get it — the stress relief space is full of products that either don't work or come with side effects like drowsiness or dependency. Here's what makes Peace different: it uses Vibrotactile Technology to work with your body's natural relaxation response — no chemicals, no CBD, no sedatives entering your system. It supports calm and clarity without the fog. What would you need to experience to feel confident it's working for you?
objections.psychology: Validate skepticism from the anti-anxiety supplement market, then differentiate VTT from sedatives and CBD

objections.response: I hear that a lot — so many people have tried meditation apps, CBD, adaptogens, or even prescription anti-anxiety meds and still feel like they're just managing symptoms. What disappointed you most about those approaches? Peace takes a completely different path — it's not a supplement you swallow or a technique you have to practice. VTT technology works with your nervous system naturally to promote calm without drowsiness or dependency. What was missing from what you tried before?
objections.psychology: Acknowledge the fatigue of cycling through stress products and position Peace as a fundamentally new approach

objections.response: No worries at all. Just curious — is it that you feel like your stress is manageable right now, or is it more that you've given up on finding something that actually helps without side effects? If it's the second one, I totally understand. Peace isn't another calming supplement or sedative — it works with your body's own neural signals to bring real clarity and calm. What would a genuine stress solution need to look like for you?
objections.psychology: Distinguish between someone who's genuinely calm and someone who's resigned to living with chronic stress

objections.response: I get it — you're stressed partly because you're so busy, right? That's exactly why Peace is perfect for people with no time. There's no meditation to schedule, no supplements to remember, no therapy appointments. You wear the patch and it supports calm and focus while you power through your day. How much of your productivity is stress actually stealing from you right now? Peace could help you get that clarity back.
objections.psychology: Flip the time objection — stress itself is the productivity killer, and Peace requires zero time commitment

objections.response: Good question — what are you looking at? Most stress products fall into a few camps: prescription anti-anxiety meds with dependency risks, CBD products with varying quality and legal gray areas, or supplements like ashwagandha that take weeks to build up. Peace uses Vibrotactile Technology — nothing enters your body. No drowsiness, no dependency, no buildup period. It works with your natural neural response for calm and clarity from day one. Have you found anything else that's truly drug-free with zero side effects?
objections.psychology: Position VTT as uniquely safe — no dependency risk, no drowsiness, no substance entering the body unlike every alternative

6_closing.title: 🏆 5 CLOSING TECHNIQUES
6_closing.pre_close: Always ask: 'Do you have any questions?' + 'Does this make sense?'

techniques.name: ASSUMPTIVE
techniques.script: I can tell you're ready to feel calm and in control again — imagine sleeping better tonight and being more present with your family. Let's get Peace headed your way. What's the best shipping address?
techniques.when: They've opened up about how stress is affecting their sleep and family life, clearly ready for a change

techniques.name: ALTERNATIVE
techniques.script: Would you like the 30-day supply to start feeling that calm and clarity, or the 90-day pack so you can really build on the momentum and enjoy better sleep and more presence with your family long-term?
techniques.when: They're interested but weighing options, mentioned wanting sustained relief rather than a quick fix

techniques.name: URGENCY
techniques.script: We've got a promotion ending this week — and honestly, every day under that stress is another night of poor sleep and another evening you're not fully present with the people who matter most. Let's lock this in and get you that calm back starting now.
techniques.when: They clearly want relief but keep putting it off, stress is visibly impacting their daily life

techniques.name: SUMMARY
techniques.script: So you want to feel calm and in control, sleep better without stress keeping you up, and be more present with your family — all without pills, sedatives, or side effects. That's exactly what Peace delivers, drug-free and effortless. Ready to get your calm back?
techniques.when: Wide-ranging conversation about stress, sleep issues, and family impact — need to bring it all together

techniques.name: REFERRAL
techniques.script: Think about your coworkers or friends who are dealing with the same kind of stress — who comes to mind? I'd love to help them find the same calm you're about to experience.
techniques.when: After the sale, they're feeling relieved and hopeful, have mentioned stressed coworkers or friends dealing with burnout

7_followup.title: 📅 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE
7_followup.goal: Build relationship → Get testimonials → Generate referrals

sequence.template: Hey {{FirstName}}! Just confirming your samples are on the way. You should receive them in about 2 days. I'll check back in when they arrive!
Hey {{FirstName}}! Your samples should be arriving today or tomorrow. Have they shown up yet? Let me know when they do — don't open them without me!
Before we open it, I want you to understand. This isn't about hype. It's about experience. I want you to pay attention to what you notice, not what you expect.

Hey {{FirstName}}, checking in! What did you notice today?
What felt different?
When did you feel it most?
What surprised you?
How are your stress levels? Feeling any calmer or more centered? How has your overall mood been?
Hope you're loving the results! Ready to keep the momentum going? Who else do you know that could use more peace and calm in their life?
Based on everything you've experienced — are you ready to make this part of your routine? Let's get you set up.
